overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a dystopian urban environment at dusk. The player moves from a covered industrial sidewalk beneath overhead pipes, across a neon-lit intersection, and onto an open palm-lined street with futuristic architecture and holographic billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial sidewalk beneath overhead pipes and building overhangs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk, passing parked vehicles and approaching pedestrians ahead

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket standing near the parked black SUV on the sidewalk

entered.detail: dark curved building facade with glass entrance doors and illuminated signage
large black industrial pipes running across the street overhead with support structures
tall concrete retaining wall with colorful graffiti tags
large black armored SUV parked along the curb with red accent lighting
large vertical digital billboard displaying red and black graphics with a face

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a semi-covered industrial sidewalk in a cyberpunk city. The path runs beside a curved modern building on the left and a graffiti-covered concrete wall on the right, with large industrial pipes overhead. The player passes a parked black SUV and approaches distant pedestrians beneath the hazy, overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway approaching major intersection with holographic advertisements

events.description: exits the industrial pipe section and enters a covered glass walkway with overhead neon billboards
turns right at the intersection to cross the street toward the open palm-lined road

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered walkway, then turning right to cross the intersection while navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead under the covered walkway toward the intersection

entered.detail: glass and metal covered walkway structure with overhead lighting and hanging billboards
vertical digital billboard displaying green and white graphics with a character image
skyscraper with illuminated 06 signage near the top, visible in the distance
tall palm trees visible across the intersection against the darkening sky

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a covered glass walkway adorned with hanging digital billboards, transitioning from the industrial pipe section toward a major intersection. The environment opens up to reveal a tall skyscraper with 06 signage and distant palm trees. The player then turns right to cross the street, moving from the sheltered walkway into the open intersection area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open multi-lane street lined with palm trees and neon-lit modern buildings

events.description: vehicle passes by on the right while walking along the road edge

agents.ego_description: walking along the open street sidewalk, passing palm trees and approaching a large building with colorful LED stripes

notable_agents.action: dark colored sedan driving past on the street with headlights on

entered.detail: large modern building facade with horizontal rainbow-colored LED light strips
tall vertical digital billboard displaying pink and red graphics with text
yellow and white striped pedestrian crosswalk lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the player now walks along an open multi-lane street lined with palm trees under a dark overcast sky. The tall 06 tower is now visible to the left, while ahead looms a large modern building adorned with vibrant rainbow LED stripes. Vehicles occasionally pass by on the road as the player continues along the sidewalk toward the illuminated structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered industrial corridor into a wide, neon-lit urban boulevard. It begins with a walk along a semi-covered sidewalk flanked by a curved modern building and graffiti-covered walls, moving beneath heavy industrial pipes and past a parked black SUV. As the camera advances, the environment shifts into a glass walkway adorned with hanging digital billboards before opening up toward a major intersection where a tall skyscraper with 06 signage becomes visible. The scene then expands as the player turns right to cross the street, transitioning from the sheltered walkway into the open air. Finally, the path leads along a multi-lane street lined with palm trees, moving past the 06 tower toward a large modern building illuminated by vibrant rainbow LED stripes under a dark overcast sky.
